cases.note: preserve grade ε dominates every floor (calculus §Worked check)
Predicated is below/incomparable to any Attenuated(δ) (calculus §Worked check)
named intentional drop; the floor demands only what survives
projecting away the bearer → bond Withheld ⊏ Intact
Attenuated(⊤) is below every finite attenuation (honest unknown)
Severed ⊏ Intact; the type also becomes FloatingQuality
Fused ⊒ Fused; the label keeps plurality recoverable
demanding Single but getting Fused → insufficient
